steps.observed: Welcome message displayed: 'Hi! I'm CareerAC, your transfer planning assistant. Tell me about your community college, where you want to transfer, and what you'd like to study. I'll help you build a personalized semester-by-semester plan.'

assertions.title: Empty or whitespace-only message is prevented

steps.expected: Send button disabled when input empty

steps.observed: Send button remains disabled after filling with whitespace

steps.action: Attempt to click disabled send button
steps.observed: Button click timed out - button is not interactable when disabled

assertions.title: AI streaming response on plan request

steps.action: Send message: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.expected: AI response streams in token-by-token within 5 seconds

evidence.network: POST /api/chat initiated but blocked by rate limit

assertions.issues: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min) prevents testing AI streaming. Multiple attempts made over extended period - all blocked by rate limit.

steps.action: Send message to trigger rate limit
steps.expected: User-friendly error message displayed, app remains responsive
steps.observed: Error toast displayed: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' with dismiss button. App remained fully functional.

assertions.title: Loading indicator shown while waiting for AI response

steps.action: Send message and observe UI state
steps.expected: Loading indicator (disabled button/spinner) visible between submission and response
steps.observed: Send button becomes disabled during processing, showing loading state

assertions.title: Continued chat modifies existing plan

steps.observed: Cannot complete - blocked by rate limit

steps.action: Send follow-up message to modify plan
steps.expected: Plan updates based on follow-up request

assertions.issues: Blocked by OpenRouter rate limit. Requires VAL-CHAT-002 to complete first.

steps.action: Mock API failure using network route abort
steps.expected: User-friendly error message, previous chat preserved, input field usable
steps.observed: Error toast displayed: 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' Chat history preserved, input field remained usable.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min) severely restricts testing of AI-dependent features. Had to wait 60+ seconds between attempts and still hit rate limits.

blockers.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 requests/minute, 50/day) prevents testing AI streaming responses. Multiple retry attempts over 5+ minutes all returned rate limit errors.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30-60 seconds between requests, still hit rate limit. Tried fresh page reloads, new test account - rate limit persists across sessions.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 5 passed, 2 blocked. Successfully verified: welcome message display, empty message prevention, rate limit error handling, loading indicator, and server error handling. AI-dependent tests (streaming response, continued chat) blocked by OpenRouter rate limit.
